# ClinX Academy

> Executive education for physicians, NPs, and PAs who want to move from clinical practice into leadership, operations, and executive roles.

ClinX Academy was founded by Alex Mohseni, MD, to fill the gap medical school leaves: no one teaches clinicians how healthcare actually works as a business. The curriculum covers Medicare Advantage economics, risk contracting, MSO/PC ownership structures, revenue cycle management, value-based care models, and health technology — giving clinicians the business fluency to compete for CMO, VPMA, medical director, and executive roles.

## Program

- [Join ClinX Academy](https://members.clinxacademy.com/store): Full program enrollment — 35+ hours of content, 25+ expert faculty, live office hours with Alex Mohseni, MD.
- [Curriculum Overview](https://clinxacademy.com/#membership): What the program teaches — Medicare Advantage, risk contracting, MSO structures, revenue cycle, health tech, and leadership skills.
- [Take the Quiz](https://members.clinxacademy.com/take-our-quiz): Assess your readiness and identify your non-clinical career path.

## Free Resources

- [10x Clinician Field Guide](https://clinxacademy.com/opt-in-62b208c8-492a-41c5-9385-890082b9c7ec): Free reference guide mapping the healthcare business ecosystem — the newsletters, communities, conferences, and key terms physician leaders use.
- [Medicare Cheat Sheet](https://clinxacademy.com/medicare-cheat-sheet): Plain-language overview of Medicare program types and payment structures for clinicians.
- [Non-Clinical Physician Jobs Guide](https://clinxacademy.com/get-non-clinical-jobs-guide-pdf): Comprehensive guide to non-clinical career paths for physicians, NPs, and PAs.
- [Weekly Job Feed](https://clinxacademy.com/weekly-job-feed): Curated non-clinical and executive healthcare job listings.

## Key Pages

- [About](https://clinxacademy.com/about): Alex Mohseni, MD — founder background, mission, and faculty.
- [Events](https://clinxacademy.com/events): Webinars, workshops, and live sessions.
- [Contact / Schedule a Discovery Call](https://clinxacademy.com/contact): 15-minute call with Alex Mohseni, MD.
- [Non-Clinical Physician Jobs](https://clinxacademy.com/non-clinical-physician-jobs): Overview of non-clinical career opportunities for physicians.
- [Blog](https://blog.clinxacademy.com): Articles on healthcare business strategy, Medicare Advantage, physician leadership, and career transitions.

## About Alex Mohseni, MD

Alex Mohseni, MD, is the founder and lead instructor of ClinX Academy. He is a physician who transitioned into healthcare leadership and built ClinX to share the business education he wished he had in medical school. ClinX Academy was established in 2025.

## What ClinX Teaches

The core curriculum covers:
- Medicare Advantage: how MA plans work, risk adjustment, Stars ratings, and what they mean for physician economics
- Risk contracting: capitation, PMPM, shared savings, and value-based care models
- MSO/PC structures: how management services organizations and professional corporations are used in healthcare ownership and physician equity participation
- Revenue cycle management: coding, billing, prior authorization, and denial management from a leadership perspective
- Health technology and digital health: how health tech companies are structured, funded, and where clinical executives add value
- Physician leadership: finance for clinicians, organizational strategy, contract negotiation, and executive communication
